description_long: This cabin features a rectangular structure with a flat, stone-textured roof bordered by wooden beams. The front facade is defined by a prominent wooden porch with a slatted overhang and railings, providing a shaded entryway. The exterior walls are finished in a marbled stone pattern, giving the building a rustic yet sturdy appearance. The porch extends across the entire front width, supported by vertical wooden posts and accessed by a small set of steps. The sides and rear of the cabin are solid, with no visible windows or doors, emphasizing privacy and protection. The overall design combines natural wood and stone materials, evoking a traditional rustic architectural style suitable for urban or park settings.
description: A rustic cabin with a flat stone-textured roof, wooden porch, and marbled stone walls, featuring a shaded entryway and solid sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide wooden porch with slatted overhang, entry steps, and detailed railings.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the solid marbled stone wall and the side profile of the porch's wooden structure.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a completely solid marbled stone wall with no openings or architectural features.
description_view_3: Right side view highlighting the wooden porch structure and the uninterrupted stone wall.
attribute_roof_type: flat roof with wooden border beams and a stone-textured surface
attribute_window_arrangement: No visible windows on any side; all walls appear solid and windowless.
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door centered on the front facade, accessed via the porch steps.
